releaseNotes: v0.24.19 — Fixes Alex's '342 scans pending upload' bug. Root cause: the sync engine batches up to 50 ops at a time, and if even ONE op in the batch was a type the server didn't recognize (quarantine and cycle-count-depleted ops shipped client-side but were never added to the server's validation list), the whole batch was rejected and the entire queue got stranded behind the bad op. Two-part fix: server now accepts those op types, AND the client falls back to one-op-at-a-time pushing whenever a batch gets rejected, so a single bad op can no longer block the rest. Plus: cycle-count now also prompts for missing fields when re-scanning an existing bottle (not just when adding a new one).
